blocks.label: ListGroup
blocks.html:
1. 1. The Industrial Arts of Poona, Thana, and Nasik, published in the Bombay Gazetteer. Compiled by Sir James Campbell.
  2. 2. List of Art Manufactures, exclusive of Textiles of the Bombay Presidency, 1885. (Printed under Government Orders.)
  3. 3. List of Raw Products of the Bombay Presidency forwarded to the Paris International Exhibition, 1878.
  4. 4. Descriptive catalogue of the Victoria and Albert Museum, Bombay.
  5. 5. Descriptive catalogue of the School of Art Museum, Bombay.
  6. 6. Descriptive catalogue of the Art-ware contributions of the Bombay Court of the Calcutta International Exhibition, 1883-84.
  7. 7. Descriptive catalogue of the Bombay Manufactures' Court at the Calcutta International Exhibition, 1883-84.
  8. 8. Manila Hemp.
  9. 9. Jute and Malachra Fibres.
  10. 10. Descriptive catalogue of the Ethnological Collection of the Bombay Court, Calcutta Exhibition, 188-384.
  11. 11. Anthropometric data of Bombay.
  12. 12. Anthropometric data of Baluchistan.
  13. 13. Anthropometric data of Burma.
  14. 14. Prabhu Marriage.
  15. 15. Position of Women among Hindus, Musalmans, Buddhists and Jains.
  16. 16. General Indefinite Characteristics of the Tribes of Burma.
